title: Ruiz & Gavi's reward for World Cup win... 150kg of tomatoes
summary: Spain's World Cup-winning players Fabian Ruiz and Gavi receive their body weight in tomatoes upon returning to their hometown of Los Palacios y Villafranca. This traditional celebratory reward highlights the homecoming of the Spanish stars following their tournament success.
content: Spain's Fabian Ruiz and Gavi receive their body weight in tomatoes when they return to their hometown Los Palacios y Villafranca.

zh.title: 鲁伊斯和加维的世界杯胜利奖励...150公斤番茄
zh.summary: 西班牙世界杯冠军球员法比安·鲁伊斯和加维回到家乡洛斯帕拉西奥斯-比拉弗兰卡后获得与其体重相同的番茄作为传统庆祝奖励。这突显了这两位西班牙明星在赛事成功后的荣归故里。

title: 'Rangers lead chase for Sturm's Fosso' - gossip
summary: Rangers are reportedly pursuing Ryan Fosso from Austrian club Sturm Graz in a competitive transfer market. Other Scottish clubs remain active, with Dundee United linked to Will Ferry and Aberdeen targeting Hibernian's Chris Cadden.
content: Rangers are reportedly leading the chase to sign Ryan Fosso from Sturm Graz, while Dundee United's Will Ferry is linked with Celtic and Aberdeen are said to want Hibernian's Chris Cadden.

zh.title: '流浪者队领先追逐施图姆的福索' - 转会传闻
zh.summary: 据报道，流浪者队正在竞争激烈的转会市场中追求奥地利俱乐部施图姆格拉茨的瑞恩·福索。其他苏格兰俱乐部仍然活跃，邓迪联队与威尔·费里有关联，阿伯丁则瞄准希伯尼安的克里斯·卡德恩。

title: Listen: Will Hibs & Well deliver in Europe? Is McInnes ban fair?
summary: Hibernian and Motherwell begin their European campaigns with analysts questioning whether both Scottish sides can progress. The discussion also addresses the fairness of McInnes' recent ban.
content: Hibs and Motherwell begin their European campaigns. Can both progress?

zh.title: 听：希伯尼安和莫瑟韦尔能在欧洲中突出重围吗？麦金尼斯禁赛公平吗？
zh.summary: 希伯尼安和莫瑟韦尔开始他们的欧洲赛事，分析人士质疑这两支苏格兰球队是否能够晋级。讨论还涉及麦金尼斯最近禁赛的公平性。

title: Who am I? Guess Premier League star No 3
summary: BBC Football presents a guessing game challenging readers to identify a Premier League player in as few attempts as possible. The interactive feature tests fan knowledge of top-flight stars.
content: Will you get today's player in as few attempts as possible?

zh.title: 我是谁？猜英超明星第3号
zh.summary: BBC足球推出一款猜谜游戏，挑战读者在尽可能少的尝试次数内识别一名英超球员。这个互动功能测试球迷对顶级联赛球星的了解程度。

title: One month, two record transfers - why English midfielders are in demand
summary: English midfielders Elliot Anderson and Morgan Rogers both commanded record transfer fees within a month, reflecting heightened demand for homegrown talent. The spike underscores the premium clubs are placing on English midfield options in the current market.
content: Elliot Anderson and Morgan Rogers both sold for record transfer fees, so why are English midfielders so in demand?

zh.title: 一个月，两笔破纪录转会——为什么英格兰中场球员需求旺盛
zh.summary: 英格兰中场球员埃利奥特·安德森和摩根·罗杰斯在一个月内都创造了创纪录的转会费，反映了对本土天才的需求增加。这个激增凸显了俱乐部在当前市场上对英格兰中场选手的重视。
